headline: Trade Desk Adds Gaming Veteran To Board As Shares Trade Below Targets
summary: The Trade Desk (NasdaqGM:TTD) has appointed David Haddad, a former Warner Bros. and Activision Blizzard executive, to its board of directors. Haddad brings over 30 years of media and gaming experience as the company adjusts to competitive pressures and recent executive turnover. The Trade Desk, a demand-side digital advertising platform, sits at the intersection of media buying, data, and programmatic ad technology. As advertisers weigh how to reach audiences across streaming, gaming, and...

headline: MNTN, Inc.: The Stock Looks Worse Than The Business
summary: MNTN stock trades at a steep discount despite 25% Q1 revenue growth, rising margins, and a strong balance sheet. Click here to read more about the MNTN stock.
